fullResponse:
Analyzed the `/opsx-archive` workflow and identified `add-cslider-component` as the only active OpenSpec change eligible for archival. Inspected the command definition in `.opencode/command/opsx-archive.md` to establish the required archive procedure, then examined the repository state under `openspec/changes/`. Confirmed that `openspec/changes/add-cslider-component/.openspec.yaml` declares the `spec-driven` schema and that `openspec/changes/add-cslider-component/tasks.md` contains only completed checklist items. Detected an existing delta spec at `openspec/changes/add-cslider-component/specs/cslider-component/spec.md` and observed that no corresponding main spec file was present under `openspec/specs/cslider-component/`, indicating a sync decision is needed before archival. Attempted `openspec list --json`, but the CLI failed with a Node.js syntax error, so repository inspection was used as the verification path.

summary: Synchronized the `CSlider` delta specification into the main OpenSpec catalog and archived the completed change `add-cslider-component`. Created the new main spec entry and moved the change bundle into the dated archive location after verifying the active change directory was cleared.
fullResponse:
Synchronized the `CSlider` delta specification into the main OpenSpec catalog and archived the completed change `add-cslider-component`. Created the new main spec entry and moved the change bundle into the dated archive location after verifying the active change directory was cleared.

Added the main specification file at `openspec/specs/cslider-component/spec.md` to preserve the `CSlider` requirements previously defined only in the change delta. Archived the completed change by moving `openspec/changes/add-cslider-component` to `openspec/changes/archive/2026-04-19-add-cslider-component`, retaining `.openspec.yaml`, `proposal.md`, `design.md`, `tasks.md`, and the delta spec subtree. Verified the archive target exists, confirmed the new main spec file is present, and confirmed `openspec/changes/` now contains only `archive/`, indicating no remaining active changes.
